env: VSS alerts profile already deployed in VLM real-time mode (`deploy -p alerts -m real-time`). Alert Bridge running and reachable. Sensor `warehouse_sample` and `Camera_02` registered in VIOS with live RTSP streams. Pre-authorized to deploy prerequisites.
description: Routing boundary: Workflow E (Slack — requires explicit 'slack'/'webhook' keywords) vs other workflows. Tests that the word 'notify' alone does NOT trigger Slack setup, and that explicit Slack keywords do.

expects.query: Set up Slack notifications for alerts
checks: The trajectory attempts to configure alert-notify (pip install, .env setup, server.py launch, or /health check) — explicit 'Slack' keyword routes to Workflow E.
The trajectory does NOT call Alert Bridge `POST /api/v1/realtime` — this is Slack setup, not alert creation.
The trajectory does NOT call `POST /generate` for this step.

expects.query: Notify me when there's smoke or fire on Camera_02
checks: The trajectory calls Alert Bridge `POST /api/v1/realtime` — 'notify me when <condition> on <sensor>' is an alert creation intent (Workflow D), NOT Workflow E.
The agent does NOT attempt to configure Slack or call alert-notify endpoints — the word 'notify' alone does not trigger Slack.
The Alert Bridge payload's `prompt` references smoke or fire detection.

expects.query: Alert and notify on my phone when there's motion on Camera_02
checks: The agent does NOT route to Workflow E — 'phone' is not Slack/webhook.
The agent either routes to Workflow D (sensor + condition present: 'motion on Camera_02') or explains that phone notifications are not supported and asks to clarify the notification channel.
